tasks.label: Resolve the lead contradiction or evidence tension
tasks.rationale: The current lane still carries a material blocker: Study found no significant correlation, contradicting the hypothesis of cumulative damage.

tasks.execution_note: Lead contradiction still active: Study found no significant correlation, contradicting the hypothesis of cumulative damage.. 5 issue(s) remain blocking.
